race.comment: Competitive. DIVAZOU (2) is free running and this is winnable dropping back some in grade. Will use the inside gate to advantage and has won twice at this trip. On an 8-day return and will give a sight. FIRE TRIBE (6) has been cruelled by wide gate his last two in provincial grade. Draws handy today and Egan stays aboard. Has the ability and should be fighting out the finish. IOANE (3) was quickly on track, winning a 56 first up over 1500m at Yarra Valley. Has been freshened and no surprise if he goes on with the job. JUSTDOIT (11) peaks and has the blinkers on for the first time. capable of finishing hard.
